title: onobrychis plantago
intro: Onobrychis plantago, also known as Psoralea plantago, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Mediterranean countries. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis plantago include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Onobrychis plantago can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
